channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: SpaceX vs. Tesla: Here's Which Elon Musk Stock I'd Buy Right Now
item.description: How do you choose today between two richly priced stocks with bright prospects in the distant future?

item.title: Jeff Bezos Challenges Elon Musk’s Tesla And SpaceX With Zoox Robotaxi, Blue Origin Mars Push
item.description: Jeff Bezos‘ companies are taking on Elon Musk‘s businesses on two fronts, as Amazon.com Inc. owned Zoox unveiled its updated Robotaxi while Bezos-owned Blue Origin showcased new technology aimed at future Mars missions. Zoox Unveils Updated Robotaxi Zoox, on Wednesday,...

item.title: After Issuing Its First Stock Split in 2020, Tesla Took Just 2 Years to Issue Its Second Split. Could a Third Stock Split Come in 2026?
item.description: Both of Tesla's previous stock splits happened during the month of August -- but don't expect another one to happen two months from now.

item.title: The Tesla Cybercab Has A Serious Challenge For Personal Vehicle Sales
item.description: We’ve written a few stories lately on why robotaxis may not do much more than replace human-driven taxis. There’s a lot of hype or hope around the idea that many people will switch from car ownership to using robotaxis, but is that really what’s likely to happen? Even beyond that, ...

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Q2 2026 delivery consensus: 406,000 vehicles expected
item.description: Tesla released its company-compiled delivery consensus for the second quarter of 2026, and Wall Street analysts now expect the automaker to deliver 406,024 vehicles. That would be just 5.7% growth over the 384,122 vehicles Tesla delivered in Q2 2025 — a modest recovery for a company that has post...

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Market At Tipping Point, Here's What To Do. Eli Lilly Soars, Tesla On Tap.
item.description: Here's what investors should do amid the stock market's divergent signals. Eli Lilly is strong while Tesla EV sales loom.

item.title: Tesla Stock Is Down This Year, and SpaceX Is Volatile. Are Either Worth Owning Right Now?
item.description: Tesla and SpaceX remain extraordinary companies, but at current valuations, investors are being asked to pay today for outcomes that are still years away from being proven.

item.title: Podcast: Slate’s $25,000 electric pickup, Polestar banned from US, Tesla FSD crash, and more
item.description: In the Electrek Podcast , we discuss the most popular news in the world of sustainable transport and energy. In this week’s episode, we discuss Slate’s $25,000 electric pickup, Polestar being banned from the US, Tesla FSD crashes coming into focus, and more.

item.title: Is Tesla’s “Full Self Driving” Worth $99/Month?
item.description: I’ve been kind of a techno nerd since I was a teenager. When I was 17 in 1957, I talked my dad into buying a 16mm film Bolex movie camera as well as the cutting and gluing machine to use for editing, for his research lab at the University Wisconsin. ...

item.title: Tesla: 2 Moonshots Have Now Become Medium-Term Catalysts (Rating Upgrade)
A $24,950 Electric Pickup Truck? Bezos-Backed Company Ready To Take On Tesla
item.description: Slate Auto, backed by Amazon.com founder Jeff Bezos, could have the secret formula to making disruption in the pickup truck market that includes Tesla Inc, Rivian Automotive, General Motors Co and Ford Motor Co. The secret could be cost. Here’s...

item.title: Elon Musk and Tim Cook issue the same red alert over new crisis in America — and it’s unlike anything they’ve ever seen
item.description: They call it a ‘hundred-year flood.’ Is your nest egg already underwater?

item.title: Analyst Behind $250 SpaceX Target Says Physical AI Will Be “One of AI’s Fastest-Growing Areas Over the Next 4-5 Years”
item.description: Oppenheimer tech analyst Timothy Horan used a recent CNBC segment to lay out a bull case for SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX), arguing that the company’s edge in artificial intelligence justifies a price target well above where shares are changing hands today. SpaceX IPO’d roughly 2 weeks ago, and Oppenheime...

item.title: Apple, Tesla Supplier Jumps 15.9% After $1.06 Billion Hong Kong IPO
item.description: Lingyi debuted strongly after raising HK$8.3 billion as it expands into AI hardware and humanoid robotics.

item.title: This Regulatory Rollback For Robotaxis Is Set To Help Tesla, Amazon, Google
item.description: The U.S. agency overseeing highway safety is considering loosening requirements for manual controls in robotaxis.

item.title: Good News For Tesla Stock Fans
item.description: Tesla Quietly Settles Full Self-Driving Lawsuit After Pedestrian Crash

item.title: Tesla: Segment Setbacks Are Shifting My Conviction (Rating Downgrade)
Tesla Stock Is Having a Bad Week and an Even Worse Month
item.description: The electric vehicle maker’s shares are sliding again, dragged down by negative headlines and worries about the broader market.

item.title: Tesla Has 2 Million Mobile Cameras, but Alphabet Has 10 Cities of Pure Driverless Data
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) and Google (NASDAQ: GOOGL) both reported Q1 FY2026 earnings that sharpened the autonomy debate in opposite directions. Tesla leaned on a global fleet streaming video into its training clusters. Alphabet leaned on Waymo collecting paid driverless miles across real city streets.

item.title: Great News For Tesla, Polestar Banned From The US
item.description: Polestar will be blocked from selling EVs in the US. It doesn’t matter. Polestar sales were close to zero so far this year.

item.title: Tesla settles lawsuit over fatal ‘Full Self-Driving’ pedestrian crash
item.description: Tesla has quietly settled the lawsuit brought by the family of a pedestrian killed by a Model Y running “Full Self-Driving,” according to Bloomberg. The terms were not disclosed. It’s the first known pedestrian death tied to FSD — and the same crash that triggered the federal investigation now ha...

item.title: Tesla Expands Production In Germany, As VW Cuts 100,000 Jobs
item.description: Tesla will expand production at its Berlin Gigafactory. Meanwhile, VW plans to close four factories in Germany, according to reports.

item.title: Beyond Rockets: SpaceX's Real Growth Story Is Its AI Infrastructure Business
item.description: The company's AI revenue was only $3.2 billion in 2025, but one investment bank predicts it will climb to $322 billion by 2030.

item.title: Tesla Semi slides on ice and impressively regains control
item.description: Tesla’s Semi program lead Dan Priestley shared a video of the electric truck holding its line on icy winter surfaces, sliding under control rather than skidding out of it. The clip is a rare look at the Tesla Semi’s Vehicle Dynamics Control (VDC) system doing exactly what an electric drivetrain i...

item.title: Forget Betting Everything on Tesla’s Robot. This Fund Already Owns the Robotics Winners
item.description: Owning Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) for the robotics story is now the dominant retail thesis: bulls argue Optimus and the Cybercab are option value the market has not paid for, and that the auto business is almost a free call on humanoid robots. The case has logic. Tesla is installing first-generation Opt...

item.title: Tesla, Sunrun Team Up To Use Home Batteries And Solar To Power AI Data Centers
item.description: Tesla Inc, Sunrun Inc and Renew Home are working together to free up enough electrical capacity to support the equivalent of 17 large data centers during periods of peak demand, the companies announced on Wednesday. Sunrun is the largest U.S....

item.title: Ross Gerber Says Slate Auto Is What Happens When 'Top Tesla And Amazon' Execs Build An EV, Predicts Buyers Will ‘Love’ Its $25,000 Pickup
item.description: Investor Ross Gerber, who is the co-founder of investment firm Gerber Kawasaki, backed Tesla Inc. rival Slate Auto‘s $25,000 electric pickup truck on Wednesday, predicting that it will become popular with customers. People Will Love The Truck In a series...

item.title: Here is Why Tesla (TSLA) is One of the Best Stocks For Beginners to Buy Now
item.description: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of the best stocks for beginners to buy now. On June 24, Sunrun, Renew Home, and Tesla formed a coalition to deliver over 16 gigawatts of flexible energy capacity to help meet surging electricity demand from data centers and AI growth.

item.title: Tesla looks keen to bring larger Model Y L to the U.S.
item.description: Tesla launched the slightly larger Model Y L in China last year, and it became a hit in no time. The longer wheelbase, larger interior, and slightly more forgiving legroom area in the Model Y L became a sought-after possibility for U.S. buyers, who have been begging the company for a larger SUV.

item.title: Here's How Much You'd Have Today If You Had Invested $10,000 in Tesla the Day Before It Completed Its Last 3-for-1 Stock Split.
item.description: Tesla has been a disappointment since its stock split.

item.title: SpaceX May Be Eyeing US Mobile Market – Even As Musk Says ‘Star’ Branding Has Gone Too Far
item.description: SpaceX’s Star-branded universe expands further with Starmind, Starpipe and reported Starlink mobile plans.

item.title: Dell To Officially Join Tesla, Oracle, Caterpillar In Texas As Stock Eyes Best Year Since Returning To Public Markets
item.description: Tesla and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk gave his sign of support to the announcement posted by founder Michael Dell on X.

item.title: NIO Stock Eyes June Delivery Test: Deutsche Bank Tracker Shows Nio Orders Beating Tesla In China
item.description: Nio’s weekly orders jumped 195% year-over-year, the strongest annual gain in the tracker, while Tesla’s two-week orders rose 5%.

item.title: Elon Musk Should 'Consider Selling EVs Again,' Says Ross Gerber As TSLA Stock Declines
item.description: Investor Ross Gerber, the co-founder of investment firm Gerber Kawasaki, has a lucrative business proposal for Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) CEO Elon Musk following the EV giant’s stock decline and mobility rollback. Elon Musk Should Consider Selling EVs Again In a post on the social media platform X,...

item.title: Sunrun, Renew Home, & Tesla Team Up to Deliver More Than 16 Gigawatts of Fast, Flexible Power for Data Centers and Large Loads
item.description: The nation’s largest developers and operators of home battery storage, smart thermostats, and vehicle-to-grid systems can orchestrate more than 16 GW of home energy resources to help meet surging electricity demand from data centers and AI growth, while helping lower household energy costs. Sunru...

item.title: TSLA, SPCX Slip Overnight: Elon Musk Warns AI Production Shortfall Is ‘Insane’ As Apple Price Shock Hits Tech
item.description: Musk called the component price spike the “biggest” he has ever seen.

item.title: Tesla Semi sliding around in Alaska
item.description: https://x.com/SawyerMerritt/status/2070249703615176839?s=20 submitted by /u/rcnfive [link] [comments]

item.title: Down 14%, Is Tesla a Good Buy Now?
item.description: In a challenging EV market, Tesla's emerging energy division could be its strongest growth engine.

item.title: Is What Trillionaire Elon Musk Said Enough of a Reason to Buy Tesla Stock?
item.description: The founder and CEO's words are music to the market's ears.

item.title: One of Tesla’s biggest threats just got banned in the U.S.
item.description: In a major development that will inevitably strengthen Tesla’s dominant position in the American EV market, Polestar has been effectively banned from selling new vehicles in the United States, starting with the 2027 model year. The U.S. Department of Commerce denied Polestar authorization under t...

item.title: Is Tesla’s (TSLA) Home-Battery Supercoalition Quietly Rewriting Its Core Energy Narrative?
item.description: Earlier this week, Sunrun, Renew Home and Tesla Energy Operations announced a framework to aggregate more than 16 gigawatts of flexible residential energy capacity across the US into turnkey grid solutions for utilities and hyperscale data centers. This coalition aims to operate what could be the...

item.title: TSLA Stock Dips — Tesla Gears Up To Ramp European Production To 7,500 Vehicles Per Week Amid FSD Push
item.description: André Thierig, Senior Director of Manufacturing at Giga Berlin, said in a post on X that the German gigafactory will increase weekly vehicle production to 7,500 units starting in October.

item.title: Mag 7 Stocks Shed Nearly $3 Trillion This Month
item.description: A massive rotation at the expense of big AI spenders has the Magnificent Seven on pace to shed $3 trillion this month. Collectively, Tesla, Apple, Microsoft, Meta Platforms, Nvidia, Amazon.com, and Alphabet have lost $2.99 trillion in market cap so far in June, according to Dow Jones Market Data....

item.title: Tesla faces lawsuit from family of victim killed in Texas home crash
item.description: Tesla investors have placed a lot of eggs in the company's autonomous driving basket to justify its 338x trailing twelve-month price-to-earnings ratio. The S&P 500 currently has a TTMPE ratio of 32, according to Multpl. The company doubled down on its autonomous driving ambitions earlier this ...

item.title: Sunrun Just Landed a Massive Tesla Deal. This Energy Stock Is Finally Getting a Major Catalyst.
item.description: A 16-gigawatt virtual power deal with Tesla sparked a sharp shift in Sunrun’s growth narrative and investor sentiment.

item.title: Tesla Stock Price Prediction: Why The EV Maker Is Sitting Right at Fair Value
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) has been one of 2026’s most-debated stocks, swinging between SpaceX-merger fever and valuation skepticism. After running the numbers, our 24/7 Wall St. price target lands almost exactly where shares trade today, with a modest single-digit upside that earns a buy rating but sto...

item.title: Micron overtakes Meta, Tesla in market value amid AI-driven demand
item.description: STORY: :: Micron Micron Technology briefly blew past the market value of Big Tech brethren Meta and Tesla for the first time ever on Thursday. Micron's stock surge came a day after the memory chip maker - and major supplier to AI powerhouse Nvidia - forecast quarterly profit and revenue well abov...

item.title: 601W’s bad week gets worse with $43M foreclosure on Tesla-leased Chicago building
item.description: Washington Capital's Paul Ravetta and 601W Companies' David Blumberg with 717 S. Desplaines Street (Getty, LinkedIn, Washington Capital, Google Maps)You know it’s a bad week when a $43 million Chicago foreclosure lawsuit is the least of your problems. That’s exactly the position New York-based co...

item.title: Polestar barred from US over the Chinese connected vehicle rule, a dangerous precedent
item.description: Polestar is pulling new vehicles out of the US market starting with model year 2027 after the Commerce Department declined to grant it authorization under the Connected Vehicle Rule, the company confirmed today. The decision effectively ends new-car sales in the US for the Geely-owned Swedish EV ...

item.title: Teslas Will Now Deploy Their Airbags Before Crashes Happen Thanks To Cameras
item.description: The manufacturer says its cameras can now help the restraint system react sooner when a collision becomes unavoidable.
